name: American Country Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, combine all the dry ingredients.
3. Cut the butter into small bits and stir them into the dry ingredients using your fingertips or a pastry cutter until well combined.
4. Slowly add the milk to the mixture while stirring continuously.
5. Once the milk has been added, knead the dough for one minute until smooth.
6. Roll the dough out to a quarter inch thickness.
7. Cut into squares and place on a dry cookie sheet.
8. Place the cookie sheet on the middle shelf of the oven.
9. Bake for 12 minutes.
